name: Padel racket Head Speed Pro 2024
meta_description: The Head Speed ​​Pro Padel Racket, With A Teardrop Shape And Head Balance, Provides Maximum Power At Impact.
og_description: The Head Speed Pro padel racket features a drop-shaped design and a head-heavy balance, providing you with maximum power on impact.
description: Your Padel Head Speed Pro 2024 racket - 2023 CollectionFor lovers of the Head brand, the Head Speed Pro racket takes up the codes, shape and playability of the old Head Alpha Pro.Offensive racket, it perfectly represents the balance between power, aggressiveness and comfort of play. Ideal racket for experienced and expert players who wish to improve the power of their shot.Composition CoreThe head Speed Pro racket is made up of the essential “Power Foam” at its core. This historic "soft" foam from the Austrian brand Head guarantees you a very comfortable touch while giving you great speed in your ball strikes. The result is worth the detour!Covering / FrameThe Head Speed Pro model is made from a combination of carbon fiber and fiberglass on both sides. The fiberglass provides comfort at impact, more flexible you will find a more pleasant sensation while gaining ball speed when leaving the racket. The carbon fiber will add rigidity and resistance to the racket to gain precision, power and durability.New for 2024! The frame of this new Head Speed Pro uses “Graphene Inside”. Graphene Inside technology is the new adaptation of graphene material. It is methodically placed in the frame and on the surfaces of the racket to optimize the performance of the material. Derived from carbon, graphene provides maximum stability and optimizes energy transfer from the blade to the ball.Additional technologiesAuxetic: New for 2024 Use of Auxetic materials which expand when stretched which improves the responsiveness of the racket upon impact with the ballSoft Buttcap: New for 2024, this soft buttcap technology is an addition of shock-absorbing rubber to the handle of the racket.Smart Bridge technology was developed to allow the racket to adapt to the user's playing style.The Skin Padel anti-shock system, a technology unique to Head, creates additional protection against shocks, to minimize the consequences over time of shocks and limit scratches.The ideal hitting zone is optimized thanks to "Optimized Sweet Spot" technology for a good adaptation of the racket to its player.Who is the ideal player for the Head Speed Pro ?The Padel Head Speed Pro racket is aimed at confirmed and expert level players looking for a combination between precision and power. Pleasant both in defense and on attack shots, it will make you perform well while having fun. It nevertheless remains more aggressive and less maneuverable than the Speed Elite and the Speed Motion.If you are looking for more rigidity and a better feeling of power in your game, the Speed Pro X version from Head is made for you!The Coach's EyeWith the Head Speed Pro, you get a very comfortable, offensive Padel racket with an emphasis on power. I was particularly amazed by the feeling of comfort it provides as well as its tolerance during off-center strikes.Offensive racket with a high balance and a weight of 370g, it will be a formidable weapon and feared by your opponents. The finishing touches will no longer hold any secrets for you!The design of this Padel racketThe Head Speed Pro racket has a dark design between anthracite and black with small touches of copper. This sober and sparkling color combination gives the Head Speed Motion racket an elegant and high-end look.
expert_notes: The Head Speed Pro padel racket features a drop-shaped design and a head-heavy balance, providing you with maximum power on impact.

name: Padel racket Starvie Dronos Galaxy 2.0 Speed
og_description: The Starvie Dronos Galaxy 2.0 racket stands out for its great versatility and a very pleasant comfort feeling upon impact. With a drop shape, it will help you to be more efficient on the courts.
description:
DESCRIPTION
The Starvie Dronos Galaxy is characterized by its great strength, durability and resistance to shocks and high temperatures thanks to its carbon and aluminium coating and its carbon frame.
The StarVie Dronos Galaxy has a teardrop shape and is made of Eva Soft foam. It offers great versatility between control and speed on attacking shots.
The racket is made in Spain to ensure the highest quality. The additional Full Plane Effect technology allows the racket to give more spin when hitting the ball.
Starvie uses the ultra speed SOFT EVA foam for the Dronos galaxy padel racket. This high quality technology gives the racket comfort and lightness.
The use of Full Plane Effect technology on the surface of the racket provides more spin in every shot.
It includes the Aluminium Tubular System technology, an aluminium reinforcement in the core of the frame that ensures greater rigidity, offering more firmness in the execution of shots while maintaining good control.
Made in Spain to ensure the highest quality.
Who is the ideal player for the Starvie Dronos galaxy 2.0?
The Starvie Dronos galaxy 2.0 is a racket designed for intermediate level padel players who are looking to take their game to the next level. It can also be used by more experienced players. It is designed for the versatile player who enjoys an offensive game.
If you are looking for a maneuverable and versatile racquet this is the racket for you.
The design of the starvie Dronos galaxy 2.0 
The starvie Dronos galaxy 2.0 is orange and blue. The azure blue on the racket evokes the intelligence and autonomy of the Dronos galaxy 2.0. The design is futuristic and extravagant on the frame and on the blade. You will have in your hands an original and futuristic racket.
Important features
Level: Intermediate/Advanced/ExpertWeight: 370 - 375 gWidth: 38mmFrame: 100% CarbonFoam: EVA SoftShape: Water dropletSurface coating: carbon fiber and aluminum fiber
expert_notes: The Starvie Dronos Galaxy 2.0 racket stands out for its great versatility and a very pleasant comfort feeling upon impact. With a drop shape, it will help you to be more efficient on the courts.

name: Padel racket Babolat Dyna Energy
meta_description: The Babolat Dyna Energy Padel Racket Is Above All A Handy And Lightweight Racket. Exclusively Designed For Padel Players.
og_description: The Babolat Dyna Energy is a dynamic racket in drop shape, which will provide you with maneuverability and give you the ability to chain strokes with comfort and speed.
description:
The surfaces of the Babolat Dyna Energy are made of Carbon Flex technology. This mix between fiberglass and carbon fiber provides the famous dynamic power described by Babolat. The flexibility of the fiberglass gives liveliness and comfort to the racket while the carbon fiber provides solidity and raw power. 
Thanks to “Micro Perf” technology, the stiffest areas of the racket are micro-perforated to enlarge the sweetspot (tolerance) of the racket while making the racket lighter.
Its 3D Spin + rough finish helps you give maximum spin (thanks to reliefs and a rough finish on the faces of the racket) to the ball while maintaining control of your racket.
The Babolat Dyna Energy 2023 racket is made up of EVA technology at its core. Fairly rigid foam that provides a lot of impact control and power.
The Dyna Energy stands out with the new Vibrasorb System technology, Powered by SMAC is made of an elastomer material which protects the player's arms and reduces the risk of injury.
Who is the ideal player for the Babolat Dyna Energy?
The Babolat Dyna Energy padel racket was developed for intermediate to advanced/Expert level padel players who are looking for dynamism and liveliness in their game. You are looking for a light and handy racket to chain hits with ease ?
Don’t hesitate any longer. Take advantage of the combination of dynamic power and maneuverability to improve your performance on the court thanks to this exceptional racket. Play light, play loose with a racket dedicated to women!
expert_notes: The Babolat Dyna Energy is a dynamic racket in drop shape, which will provide you with maneuverability and give you the ability to chain strokes with comfort and speed.

name: Padel racket Siux Electra ST2 Stupa 2023
og_description: The Siux Electra ST2 Stupa 2023 has been specially designed for Franco Stupaczuk, a top 8 player worldwide for several years. It is a teardrop-shaped racket, with a medium balance and weight. It will provide you with very good versatility between control and power.
description:
This top-of-the-range padel racket, made from top-quality materials, is also extremely durable thanks to several reinforcement zones around the frame of the racket. 
The Siux brand has opted for Ultra Soft High Recovery EVA foam as the core of the Siux Electra ST2. This high-quality low-density foam provides a sensation of speed when coming out of the racket and comfort when playing, as well as a certain amount of control when the intensity on the court increases.
On the surface, it is made up of a "carbon 15K" fibre. This carbon fibre gives the racket great power at impact without any loss of control.
The Bitude carbon frame technology used in the frame of the pala provides a high level of stability. The Bitude carbon frame technology gives the racket extra power and resistance.
For those who love spin, the Siux Electra ST2 has a sandblasted surface for greater spin.The combination of Shockout and Ultimate Tech technologies gives Stupa's racket excellent vibration absorption to prevent elbow pain.
Who is the ideal player for this racket?
The Siux Electra ST2 Stupa 2023 is aimed at advanced to expert padel players looking for a good balance between power and control in a very comfortable racket. 
Comfortable at impact, this quality racket, once tamed, will make you a danger to all your opponents.A real jewel of versatility!
Don't wait any longer, treat yourself to a racquet from Franco Stupaczuk, one of the most spectacular players on the world tour.
expert_notes: The Siux Electra ST2 Stupa 2023 has been specially designed for Franco Stupaczuk, a top 8 player worldwide for several years. It is a teardrop-shaped racket, with a medium balance and weight. It will provide you with very good versatility between control and power.

name: Padel racket Head Extreme Elite 2024
meta_description: The Head Extreme Elite Diamond-shaped Padel Racket Has A Medium Balance. Handy And Powerful, In A Word, Versatile!
og_description: The Head Extreme Elite 2024 racket is the ultimate powerful racket for intermediate to advanced level players. Its diamond shape gives it a head-heavy balance, providing maneuverability and power in your shots.
description: Break new boundaries with the Head Extreme Elite – 2023 CollectionWeighing 365 g, the Head Extreme Elite is designed for both men and women. It combines maneuverability, power, and control, making every shot more effective. Each stroke with this exceptional padel racket allows you to feel the unique versatility that defines the Head Extreme Elite.Head Extreme Elite TechnologiesFiberglassThe frame and faces of the Head Extreme Elite are made of fiberglass, providing superior comfort and forgiveness on every shot.Power FoamThe core of the Head Extreme Elite is made with Power Foam. This foam is the perfect ally for generating outstanding power without compromising comfort.Auxetic StructureA major innovation this year, the “Auxetic” structure is strategically placed within the frame. It allows the carbon fibers to expand and contract upon impact, providing an incredible energy return and a pleasant, responsive feel.Anti Shock SkinEquipped with the “Anti Shock Skin” system — a polymer material that forms a protective layer to safeguard the racket against impacts.The FrameThe frame of the Head Extreme Elite has been individually engineered for each tube section, resulting in a racket that is more durable and delivers better performance.Smart BridgeThe “Smart Bridge” system enhances player control and shot precision on every padel court.Will the Head Extreme Elite revolutionize your game?The Extreme Elite is designed for players who need additional power at the net while maintaining great maneuverability. Ideal for intermediate players seeking versatility in their strokes, it suits both men and women, right- or left-handed. A truly unisex racket that helps create decisive differences on the court and surprises opponents.Discover the elite of designYou’ll fall in love with the look of this new Head Extreme Elite. Dominated by vibrant yellow tones, its surface brings freshness and energy, while the black Head logo in the center adds a touch of boldness and personality.Head: The racket sports brandIn the world of padel, Head is already a benchmark brand. For many years, it has successfully invested in the sport, earning the trust of passionate players like the famous Sanyo Gutiérrez. With top-quality rackets, apparel, bags, and accessories, Head has become one of the most prestigious names in padel.If you’re seeking even higher performance, choose the Head Extreme Motion !
expert_notes: The Head Extreme Elite 2024 racket is the ultimate powerful racket for intermediate to advanced level players. Its diamond shape gives it a head-heavy balance, providing maneuverability and power in your shots.

name: Padel racket Head Extreme One 2023
meta_description: The Diamond-shaped Extreme One Racket Combines Power And Control, Making Your Shots More Effective.
og_description: The Head Extreme One 2023 padel racket is the new generation of Head rackets. With a diamond shape, it has a head-heavy balance, offering perfect versatility between power and maneuverability.
description:
The frame and sides of the Head Extreme One are made up of layers of 12k carbon fibre and grahene. This combination provides maximum resistance. As well as boosting power, it improves the precision and feel of your shots.

The core of the Head Extreme One padel is made from Power Foam. This foam is the ideal ally for obtaining unrivalled power without neglecting all the comfort of Foam.

What's new about the Extreme One this year is its "Auxetic" structure. This new technology is strategically positioned in the frame of the racket. It gives the carbon characteristics that allow its fibres to expand and contract on impact. The result is an incredible energy return from the ball, plus a pleasant feel.

The Head Extreme One also features the Anti Shock Skin system, a polymeric material that creates shock protection for your racket. 

The frame of the Head Extreme One has been made to measure and each section of tube has been individually constructed. This construction technique results in a more durable and higher-performing racket. 

It also features the 'Smart Bridge' system, which improves control and precision for players on the padel court.

 

Who is the ideal player for the Extreme One?
For players who need extra support at the net, the Extreme Pro is for you! It's designed for advanced or even experienced players who want to control their powerful shots. It's perfect for offensive players who want to be aggressive at net. The Head Extreme Pro racquet makes a difference on the court and will surprise your opponents. Weighing in at just 345g, this is a mixed racquet designed for both men and women!

 

Head Extreme One 2023: a racket with just one hole!
Designed to bring the single-hole racket back into fashion, Head's Extreme One launches a new era! In terms of feel, there's no difference in manoeuvrability with a classic racket! This unique style will leave no one indifferent!

 

Head: The racquet sports brand
In the world of Padel, the Head brand needs no introduction. In fact, the brand has been investing in padel for many years now, and it's been a great success. Little by little, Head has managed to win over a passionate audience of players, including the famous Sanyo Guttierez. Thanks to its high-quality padel rackets, clothing, bags and accessories, Head is now one of the most prestigious padel brands.
expert_notes: The Head Extreme One 2023 padel racket is the new generation of Head rackets. With a diamond shape, it has a head-heavy balance, offering perfect versatility between power and maneuverability.

name: Padel racket Nox LA10 Future By Leo Augsburger 2024
meta_description: Leo Augsburger's LA10 Future Padel Racket Is New For 2024. Its Diamond Shape And Head Balance Will Appeal To Attacking Players Looking For Power.  The 12K Alu Carbon Surface And EV50 Foam Give The Racket Maximum Rigidity.
og_description: The Padel racket LA10 Future by Leo Augsburger is a new release for 2024. Its Diamond shape and head-heavy balance will appeal to attacking players looking for power.
description:
Your LA10 Future by Leo Augsburger 2024 racquet
Adopt the aggressive game of Leo Augsburger with this 100% attacking racket. The materials of the LA10 Padel racket are designed to bring maximum power to your game. The 12K Alu Carbon surface and EV50 foam give the racket maximum rigidity. This advanced to expert level paddle will enhance your volleying and smashing technique. The rough finish will also allow you to apply maximum spin and bring your opponents to their knees.
Technical description of the LA10 by Leo Augsburger 2024 Padel racket
Surface coating of the racket
12K Alu - 12K carbon surface made from interwoven carbon fibres that provide rigidity while reducing the thickness of the carbon and therefore the weight of the racket. The surface of the racket is also aluminised, so it's protected by a thin layer of aluminium for a more comfortable feel and better resistance to temperature variations. 
Rough Surface - A padel racket with rough surfaces for maximum spin on shots.
Composition of the foam/core of the racket
EV50 - High-density foam with rapid memory effect for a noticeable increase in power.
Additional technologies
Smart strap - Allows easy replacement of the strap without losing the warranty on the paddle.
AVS - Foam integrated into the racket frame to absorb some of the vibrations. This helps to protect the elbow in particular.
Carbon frame - The use of a carbon frame gives the racquet greater robustness for a longer lifespan.
Dynamic Composite structure (DCS) - a technique used to reinforce the surface of the racket close to the frame to minimise cracking. 
Who is the ideal player for the LA10 Future paddle?
To appreciate the full power of this paddle, you need to be attack-minded. This top-of-the-range paddle will allow you to make the most of the variation in pace that you want to impose on your opponent. If you're a powerful and fast player at an advanced level, the AL10 by Leo Augsburger will give you all the weapons you need to improve your game!
Design of the LA10 by Leo Augsburger racket
The design of the LA10 Future paddle is quite spectacular and suggests a carbon surface. Silver details and red lines are combined with this sober and effective design. The design suggests dynamism and efficiency on the padel court.
Key features
Level : Advanced/ExpertWeight: 360-375gWidth: 38mmFrame: 100% CarbonFoam: EVA50Shape: DiamondSurface coating: 12k carbon Alu
expert_notes: The Padel racket LA10 Future by Leo Augsburger is a new release for 2024. Its Diamond shape and head-heavy balance will appeal to attacking players looking for power.

name: Padel racket Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024
meta_description: The Nox AT Luxury Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 Racket Is Powerful, Designed For Advanced Players Looking For Exceptional Performance.
og_description: The Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 racket offers incredible power, designed for advanced players looking for exceptional performance on the court. With a diamond shape, a head-heavy design, and cutting-edge technology, it will provide optimal maneuverability and precise shots to dominate the offensive game.
description:
Your Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 Racket
Discover the Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 racket, designed to embody the aggressive game of Agustin Tapia. This 100% attacking padel features materials designed to maximise the power of your game. The 18K Alu Carbon surface and high-density foam provide optimum rigidity, highlighting your technique on volleys and smashes. With its rough finish, it also offers the possibility of applying a striking effect, leaving your opponents baffled. A weapon of choice for advanced to expert level players.
Technical specifications of the Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 racket
Racket surface coating
18K Carbon Fibre - The carbon fibre strands are skilfully interlaced, creating a checkered structure. With a higher grammage, 18K Carbon ensures power and durability, offering a remarkable return of force thanks to its very high density.
Textured surface - The addition of a rough surface as a final layer improves the racket's grip, allowing you to surprise your opponents with unexpected spin, just like Augustín Tapia.
Composition of the foam/racket core
MLD Black Eva foam - Multilayered Black Eva (MLD) foam comes in a variety of densities, offering a return of force adapted to each situation, ideal for a versatile game.
Additional technologies
Pulse Antivibration System - The Pulse System, implanted at the heart of the racket, ensures greater comfort by minimising the transmission of vibrations to the elbow.
EOS Flap Technology - To promote aerodynamics and optimum balance, EOS Flap technology incorporates perforations in the core of the racket.
Dynamic Composition Structure - Dynamic Composition Structure (DCS) technology uses a large amount of material in the frame, minimising differences in hardness between the frame and the head of the racket, ensuring greater durability.
Smart Strap - The snowshoe strap is designed to be easily interchangeable, providing a hygienic and secure solution. Customise your strap to your preference and replace it at your convenience.
Who is the ideal player for the Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 ?
To fully exploit the power of the Nox AT Luxury Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024, a resolutely offensive approach is essential. This top-of-the-range Padel racket allows you to fully exploit the variations in pace you want to impose on your opponents. If you're an advanced, powerful and fast player, the Nox AT Luxury Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 gives you all the weapons you need to refine your game and take it to the next level!
Design of the Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 racket
The design of the Nox AT Luxury Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 racket combines elegance and modernity. With its clean lines and dynamic colour palette, it has a bold aesthetic. Accents of black, blue and subtle touches of grey reflect the strength and finesse of the aggressive game it embodies.

Key features
Level: Advanced/ExpertWeight: 360-375gWidth: 38mmFrame: 100% CarbonFoam: MLD Black EVAShape: DiamondSurface coating: 18K Carbon Alu
expert_notes: The Nox AT Genius Attack 18K Agustin Tapia 2024 racket offers incredible power, designed for advanced players looking for exceptional performance on the court. With a diamond shape, a head-heavy design, and cutting-edge technology, it will provide optimal maneuverability and precise shots to dominate the offensive game.

name: Padel racket NOX AT10 Genius 12K By Agustin Tapia 2024
meta_description: The AT10 Genius 12K By Agustin Tapia Padel Racket Has A Teardrop Shape And Is Of Medium Weight. It Is Of High Quality For Experienced Players.
og_description: The AT10 Genius 12K padel racket by Agustin Tapia, with a drop-shaped design, medium weight, and balance, is a high-quality racket for experienced players. Powerful and maneuverable at the same time, it will offer you increased versatility !
description:
Your AT10 Genius 12K Padel racket by Agustin Tapia
The notable difference between the AT10 Genius 12K and the AT10 Genius 18k lies in the composition of the racquets' surface. The AT10 Genius 12K has less carbon on the surface, making it slightly softer at impact than the AT10 Genius 18K. A slightly more comfortable racquet, but slightly less powerful than the 18K.
The softer AT10 12K can be considered for use in winter, while the AT10 18K is better suited to warmer conditions.
Technical description of the AT10 Genius 12K by Agustin Tapia 2024
Racquet surface coating
Thanks to Dynamic Composit Structure technology, the AT10 Genius 12K Padel is much less fragile and therefore more durable over time. 
For lovers of rigid power, the 12K carbon surface will delight you. It generates a return of force and very good power without neglecting good control at ball impact.
The rough 'sandblasted' surface gives you more spin on your shots. Like Agustin Tapia, try your hand at magical shots with this superior spin grip.
Composition of the AT10 Genius 12K sponge
You don't change a winning team! For the foam inside the AT10 Genius 12K racket, the Spanish brand Nox has opted for MLD Black Eva technology. It's a memory foam that helps the racket regain its shape, giving it greater hitting power. 
Additional technologies
This racket also features "oversize grip" technology, with a longer handle for a better grip.
Its pulse anti-vibration system absorbs the maximum amount of vibration caused by off-centre shots. The vibrations transmitted to players' arms are therefore absorbed, reducing the risk of injury. 
Nox's new innovation this year is the Smartstrap wrist strap system. The strap is easily detached and can be replaced when worn, or with another of the strap models developed by Nox. All in all, this system improves hygiene and safety without losing the guarantee of the racket.
The racket has been awarded 'Testea Padel' certification, which confirms its durability and quality. In fact, the racket has undergone a series of laboratory tests to make sure that the frame, faces and mounting are resistant.
Who is the ideal player for the AT10 Genius 12K Agustin Tapia 2024?
This Padel is designed for advanced to professional level players who are looking for versatility and manoeuvrability in their game. Its medium weight and balance will also suit good level female players. If you're looking for versatility, go for it! Softer than its big sister, the AT10 Genius 18K, it's more comfortable to play.
Nox AT10 Genius 12K design: two sides in different colours
The design of this racket was created with the help of the world's number 1 player, Argentine Agustin Tapia.
The predominant surface colour is grey. What's new is the colour change between white and blue from one side of the racket to the other.
The Nox X in the middle of the racket is once again evident.
NOX: The 100% Spanish padel brand
Miguel Lamperti and Agustin Tapia's famous Spanish brand is renowned throughout the padel world for its high quality. The rackets are suitable for all player profiles. Nox has succeeded in differentiating itself thanks to its playability and manoeuvrability, which appeal to beginners and professionals alike.
Key features
Level: Advanced/ExpertWeight: 360-375gWidth: 38mmFrame: 100% CarbonFoam: MLD Black EvaShape: Water dropletSurface coating: Carbon 12k
expert_notes: The AT10 Genius 12K padel racket by Agustin Tapia, with a drop-shaped design, medium weight, and balance, is a high-quality racket for experienced players. Powerful and maneuverable at the same time, it will offer you increased versatility !

description:

Racket surface coating 
18K Carbon Fibre - The carbon fibre strands are skilfully interlaced, creating a checkered structure. With a higher grammage, 18K Carbon ensures power and durability, offering a remarkable return of force thanks to its very high density.
Textured Surface - The addition of a rough surface as a final layer improves the racket's grip, allowing you to surprise your opponents with unexpected spin.
Composition of the foam/core of the racket 
EVA HR3 - High-density foam with shape memory that adapts to your game and provides plenty of power on every shot.
Additional technologies 
Pulse Antivibration System - The Pulse System, implanted in the heart of the racket, guarantees increased comfort by minimising the transmission of vibrations to the elbow.
EOS Flap Technology - To promote aerodynamics and optimum balance, EOS Flap technology incorporates perforations in the core of the racket.
Dynamic Composition Structure - Dynamic Composition Structure (DCS) technology uses a large amount of material in the frame, minimising differences in hardness between the frame and the head of the racket, ensuring greater durability.
Smart Strap - The snowshoe strap is designed to be easily interchangeable, providing a hygienic and secure solution. Customise your strap to your preference and replace it at your convenience.
Who is the ideal player for the Nox ML10 Shotgun 18K 2024?

name: Padel racket Head RADICAL Elite 2024
meta_description: The Head Radical Elite 2024 Racket Is The Versatile Racket For Intermediate To Advanced Players.
og_description: The Head Radical Elite 2024 racket is the versatile racket for intermediate to advanced level players. Its teardrop shape will provide you with a medium balance and good maneuverability.
description:
Your Head Radical Elite 2024 racket
With a weight of 365g, the Head Radical Elite is suitable for both men and women. It combines maneuverability, power, and control, making its shots more effective. Every shot played with this exceptional padel racket will allow you to feel the characteristic versatility of the Head Extreme Elite.
Technical description of the Head Radical Elite racket
The frame and faces of the Head Radical Elite are composed of fiberglass, making it comfortable and forgiving.
The core of the Radical Elite padel racket is made of Control Foam.
The Radical Elite racket incorporates the "Auxetic" structure. This new technology strategically positioned at the frame of the racket gives the carbon characteristics that allow its fibers to expand and contract during impacts. This provides an incredible energy return from the ball and a pleasant sensation.
The frame of the Head Radical Elite has been custom-made, and each tube section has been built individually. This construction technique results in a more durable and higher-performing racket.
It also features the "Smart Bridge" system, which improves the control and precision of players on the padel court.
Who is the ideal player for the Radical Elite?
For players who need an extra boost at the net while maintaining maneuverability, the Radical Elite is for you! It is designed for intermediate level players looking for versatility. It will perfectly suit both right and left-handed players, as well as men and women. It's a true mixed racket! The Head Extreme Elite racket allows you to make a difference on the court and surprise your opponents.
Design of the Head Extreme Elite 2023 racket
You will be charmed by the design of this new Head Radical Elite racket. Red dominates the surface of the racket, giving a feeling of power. In the center of the racket, we find the Head logo in black, adding a touch of character.
Head: The racket sports brand
In the world of Padel, the Head brand needs no introduction. Indeed, for many years, the brand has invested in padel, and it has been a success. Head has gradually managed to conquer a public of passionate players, including the famous Sanyo Guttierez. Thanks to high-quality padel rackets, textiles, bags, and accessories, Head is now one of the most prestigious Padel brands.
expert_notes: The Head Radical Elite 2024 racket is the versatile racket for intermediate to advanced level players. Its teardrop shape will provide you with a medium balance and good maneuverability.

name: Padel racket Adidas Metalbone Carbon 3.3 2024
meta_description: The Adidas Metalbone Carbon 3.3 2024 Padel Racket, Diamond Shape, Ensures Maximum Power With Each Ball Strike.
og_description: Discover unmatched power combined with ultimate comfort with the Adidas Metalbone Carbon 3.3 2024. It will suit you perfectly if you are a demanding player seeking perfection in your shots.
description:
Your Adidas Metalbone Carbon 3.3 2024 racket
This top-of-the-range padel racket, made from top-quality materials, is also defined by its durability, thanks to several reinforcement zones around the frame. Its "light" weight of 345-360g counterbalances the distribution at the head of the racket, giving it maneuverability. This is a racket that remains very comfortable to play.
Adidas has opted for EVA SOFT Performance foam as the core of Metalbone Carbon. This high-quality hybrid foam, which is neither too rigid nor too soft, provides a sensation of speed when coming out of the racket and comfort when playing, as well as a certain amount of control when the intensity on the court increases.
The surface is made of "carbon aluminized 2 to 1" fiber. This ultra-resistant hybrid carbon fiber is neither too rigid nor too flexible. It gives the snowshoe great impact power without compromising playing comfort. 
The octagonal frame structure provides extra power and resistance.
For lovers of spin, Adidas Padel uses two additional technologies (Spin Blade & Smart Holes Curves) exclusively designed to increase the spin of all Metalbone and Adipower racquets.  
The non-linear drilling pattern on the Metalbone Carbon 3.3 2024 heads allows better manoeuvrability to accentuate the spin in your shots. Coupled with the 3D Spin Blade relief, you'll find one of the most spin-enhancing paddle rackets on the market.
The plus point of the Metalbone range is undoubtedly its customizable "weigh & balance" technology. This allows weights to be added in predefined positions on the racket. This is a real advantage for players who want to slightly modify the balance and weight of their racket.
What's the ideal player for this racket?
The Adidas METALBONE Carbon is designed for advanced to expert padel players with an aggressive style and good technique. A demanding padel racket, it requires good physical condition. Once you've got the hang of it, you won't be disappointed in terms of power and ball speed. Explosive on attacking shots, it will make you a successful attacking player.
Comfortable at impact yet maneuverable thanks to its "light" weight, this quality racquet, once tamed, will make you a danger to all your opponents. 
Don't wait any longer, treat yourself to Ale Galán's racquet, the world number 1 on the WPT circuit. It's available in our online store.
The coach's eye
The Metalbone Carbon from Adidas is a Padel racket designed for power and aggression. This model, with its quality finish and design, will be your companion for many months to come. All the technologies and materials used in this Padel racket have been chosen to make it a real offensive weapon. 
When I tried out the racket, I was immediately surprised by its ball speed when coming out of the racket. Particularly on attacking shots such as volleys and smashes. The weight distribution at the head of the racquet is noticeable from the very first strokes.
Light in weight, I was pleasantly surprised by its maneuverability, which gave me better control when exchanges accelerated. After a few minutes' adjustment, it becomes a real offensive weapon! Extremely comfortable to play, despite a heavy head!
A racquet for players with a good level of technique, who want to increase their power and aggressiveness. Don't wait any longer! If you're looking for a Padel racket with the same control-oriented characteristics, look no further than the Metalbone CTRL 3.3.
expert_notes: Discover unmatched power combined with ultimate comfort with the Adidas Metalbone Carbon 3.3 2024. It will suit you perfectly if you are a demanding player seeking perfection in your shots.

name: Padel racket Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024
meta_description: The Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024 Padel Racket, Adjustable Weight, Combines Soft EVA Foam And Aluminized Carbon For Comfort And Power.
og_description: The Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024 is an adjustable weight racket designed for advanced level players. It will offer you a sense of comfort and power with every shot.
description:
Dominate the court with the new Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024:
This control-focused variant of the Metalbone 3.3 features a round shape to enhance striking precision, with a strategically positioned sweetspot near the center, thanks to a low balance.
The padel racket is made of fiberglass.
However, it's important not to mistake a control-focused racket for one intended for beginners. On the contrary, this racket is specially designed for experienced players.
The carbon frame construction, with an octagonal structure, strengthens the racket while significantly improving force feedback, making it suitable for expert-level players.
For a softer striking sensation, the foam inside has low density. The EVA Soft provides enhanced sensations while limiting vibration transmission to the arm.
The frame surface is embossed to facilitate spin creation, allowing you to surprise opponents with each strike.
The hole layout is meticulously designed to enlarge the sweetspot, making strikes more forgiving.
Weights are placed on the sides of the core. Supplied with a padel racket-shaped keychain, you can easily adjust them for more control.
Technologies of the Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024 racket:
Octagonal structure
The strength of the racket's frame and core is enhanced by an octagonal tube. This reinforcement increases the racket's rigidity, promoting power amplification.
WEIGHT & BALANCE SYSTEM
This is a weight system placed on each side of the racket's core. Its purpose is to allow you to customize the weight and balance of your racket according to your preferences to enhance your gameplay.
SMART HOLES CURVE
The perforations on the racket are designed to enlarge the striking area. Thanks to their even distribution, they increase the padel racket's tolerance.
EVA DENSITY SOFT PERFORMANCE
The racket's foam composition is low-density EVA, offering increased playing comfort through efficient vibration absorption.
SPIN BLADE OCTOGONAL
The racket's frame surface is textured to improve spin generation, which is perfect when you want to surprise an opponent with an unexpected effect.
Who will handle the Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024?
The Adidas Metalbone 3.3 CTRL racket is specially designed for professional-level players who want to achieve optimal control while retaining effective power.
When style meets functionality: the undeniable charm of the Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024 by Adidas
The Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024 racket stands out for its elegant yet functional design, crafted to meet the demands of advanced players seeking to optimize their control and power on the court. The choice of materials and finish reflects Adidas' commitment to quality and innovation.
It strikes a carefully balanced equilibrium between modern aesthetics, cutting-edge materials, and technological innovations, all designed to deliver unparalleled performance and appearance on the court.
Key features:
Level: Advanced/Expert
Weight: 360-375g
Width: 38mm
Frame: Carbon
Foam: EVA Soft
Shape: Round
expert_notes: The Adidas Metalbone CTRL 3.3 2024 is an adjustable weight racket designed for advanced level players. It will offer you a sense of comfort and power with every shot.

Your Oxdog Sense Tour 2024 Padel Racket:
Featuring a round shape and handle balance, this racket is perfect for lobs and precise strikes.
Made of carbon, it provides excellent force feedback while being reinforced. With this racket, you can aim for precision and become a true sharpshooter.

The exceptional HES-Carbon offers a faster response time and maximizes energy transfer, resulting in improved speed, power, and durability. Oxdog's distinctive carbon and resin process optimizes fiber performance, enhancing their capabilities. The High Energy System excels when faced with more demanding challenges, showcasing its superior functionality.
Its exclusive Vibradamp device features a three-layer structure designed to reduce vibrations during matches. It consists of a Vibradamp fiber placed at the heart of the handle for effective vibration absorption.
The Double Size Hole (DSH) configuration was specifically designed to enhance spin effect, power, and stability. This innovative design improves maneuverability, both within the optimal hitting zone and beyond, resulting in enhanced performance.

meta_description: Here Is The Ultimate Pro+ From Oxdog, A Padel Racket Designed Specifically For Advanced Competitors Wanting Unparalleled Power.
og_description: The Ultimate Pro+ from Oxdog is a racket specifically designed for advanced competitors seeking unparalleled power. It features a head-heavy balance, ideal for delivering powerful strikes and smashes. Made with quality materials, it guarantees exceptional power and unrivaled durability.
description: Your Oxdog Ultimate Pro + 2023 Padel Racket:Its diamond-shaped design ensures perfect balance for executing devastating smashes and high-intensity shots.The ultra-dense carbon frame of the racket confers unprecedented power and exceptional durability. Moreover, equipped with SilentSpeed technology, the Ultimate Pro+ optimizes striking power while minimizing vibrations.The innovation in hole distribution increases the racket's tolerance, with enlarged holes at the perimeter compared to those in the center, creating an expanded sweetspot and a more forgiving contact zone.The Ultimate Pro+ also integrates other advanced technologies into its structure.The revolutionary Oxdog SilentSpeed Technology elevates the game to new heights.When combined with PowerRibs technology, SilentSpeed transforms your power into speed with reduced effort and noise while maintaining superior ball control.The combination of PowerRibs™ and HES-Carbon enhances speed and durability, with each racket shape optimized to achieve the best possible performance.The HES-Carbon frame ensures increased responsiveness and optimizes energy transfer, resulting in improved speed, power, and durability.The new Ultimate Pro + 2023 racket is equipped with Double Size Hole (DSH), specially designed to improve spin, power, and balance. This innovative design enhances playability and performance. By incorporating the DSH pattern, the racket maximizes power output, thus offering an enhanced playing experience.The exclusive Vibradamp system, with its three-layer structure, is designed to reduce vibrations, incorporating a Vibradamp fiber in the middle of the handle for effective absorption. This significantly reduces stress on the wrist, elbow, and shoulder during play.For which player?The Oxdog Ultimate Pro+ emerges as the ultimate tool for elite players seeking to dominate the game with power, control, and comfort.Key Features:Shape: DiamondWeight: 360g-375gFoam: Hard EVABalance: HighAttribute: PowerLevel: Advanced
expert_notes: The Ultimate Pro+ from Oxdog is a racket specifically designed for advanced competitors seeking unparalleled power. It features a head-heavy balance, ideal for delivering powerful strikes and smashes. Made with quality materials, it guarantees exceptional power and unrivaled durability.

description:
Your SIUX Electra ST3 LITE 2024 Padel Racket:
Discover the latest offering from Siux, the Electra ST3 Lite, an exceptionally comfortable racket.
Its comfort is mainly due to its round shape, which ensures optimal control without sacrificing power.
Technical description of the SIUX Electra ST3 LITE 2024 racket:
The weight balanced towards the handle allows for great maneuverability, facilitating quick reactions. The 15k carbon coating offers a combination of hardness and resistance for increased control and power while maintaining the touch.
The core made of dense Eva Hard rubber provides appreciable raw power for smashes and improved control of trajectories, especially in ball length, making this model a rigid racket suitable for advanced players.
Additionally, two Shockout anti-vibrators are integrated at the bottom of the frame, with a ShockOut anti-vibration overgrip on the handle, reducing vibrations and protecting the joints while enhancing the playing comfort and grip of the racket.
Who is the ideal player for the FENIX IV PRO 2024?
The Siux Electra ST3 Lite padel racket is perfect for advanced to expert players seeking a combination of precision, power, and control in their games.
Design of the FENIX IV PRO 2024 racket? 
The comfort of this racket is primarily due to its round design, ensuring maximum control without compromising power. A textured finish varnish along with glossy paint enhances the effects on the ball while improving the exit speed, allowing for precise and powerful shots.
expert_notes: The SIUX Electra ST3 LITE 2024 is a control racket with a round shape, with a weight balance towards the handle. It is the "light" version of the control racket Electra ST3 Pro.

name: Padel racket SIUX FENIX IV PRO 2024
meta_description: The Fenix ​​IV Pro 2024 Is A Diamond-shaped Racket, Offering Head Balance That Favors Smashes And Powerful Shots.
og_description: The Fenix IV Pro 2024 is a diamond-shaped racket that will offer you a head-heavy balance to favor smashes and powerful shots.
description:
Your 2024 Fenix IV Pro Padel Racket:
The Fenix IV has a different sweetspot compared to its previous version, with a larger hitting area located at the head of the racket.
The power of the Fenix IV Pro also comes from its composition of 18K carbon. This high-quality carbon material, used in aerospace, offers a perfect combination of power and strength.
The Siux Fenix IV racket is equipped with high-density EVA foam inside, which adds extra stiffness for increased power. It is important to note that this stiffness may slightly reduce comfort during play, making this racket more suitable for high-level players.
The grip of the Fenix IV Pro has a spiral structure that facilitates gripping the racket and improves the feeling of control.
Technical Description of the 2024 Fenix IV Pro Padel Racket:
The frame is made of high-density 18K carbon, offering power and resistance.
HARD EVA: The foam of this racket is high density, allowing for powerful force feedback.
FULL 18K CARBON: The 18K carbon used in the frame is of very high quality, also used in aerospace, offering exceptional power.
SHOCKOUT: The racket is equipped with anti-vibrators for better hitting sensations by absorbing impacts.
ULTIMATE TECH: The core of the racket is designed with a structure that limits vibrations while promoting force feedback.
BITUBE CARBON FRAME: The racket frame is reinforced with carbon inside, making it more durable and resistant to shocks.
Who is the ideal player for the 2024 FENIX IV PRO?
The ideal player for the Siux Fenix IV Pro 2024 racket is an advanced to expert level player. This racket is designed for players seeking maximum power in their shots, especially for smashes and powerful strokes.
Thanks to its diamond shape and head-heavy balance, the Fenix IV Pro offers excellent power concentration, making it suitable for players who prefer an offensive and aggressive game.
However, it is important to note that this racket is less suitable for beginner or intermediate level players due to its stiffness. It requires a certain level of technical mastery and good physical strength to fully exploit its potential.
If you are an experienced player looking for a powerful racket that allows you to deliver explosive shots and impose your game on the padel court, the 2024 Fenix IV Pro is made for you.
Racket Design
The design of the 2024 Fenix IV Pro racket is both elegant and modern. With its bronze hues, it immediately catches the eye on the padel court. The brand logo is subtly present in several places on the racket, adding a touch of sophistication. It is located above the handle, giving the racket a distinctive identity.
Overall, the design of the 2024 Fenix IV Pro racket harmoniously combines colors, patterns, and visual details to create a racket that is both performance-oriented and aesthetically pleasing. It blends elegance and modernity to accompany you on the padel court with style.
expert_notes: The Fenix IV Pro 2024 is a diamond-shaped racket that will offer you a head-heavy balance to favor smashes and powerful shots.

The Cross Pro 2023 from Royal Padel is a high-end padel racket, combining power, spin and comfort.
Its black and orange design, both modern and elegant, adds a touch of aggression. Thanks to its diamond shape, it offers head balance which improves smashes, while its carbon and fiberglass manufacturing guarantees strength and solidity.

name: Padel racket SIUX DIABLO REVOLUTION III Junior 2024
og_description: The Siux Diablo Revolution JR 3 is perfectly suited to junior players, thanks to its hybrid mold and low balance which promote better control.
description:
Your DIABLO REVOLUTION III Junior 2024 padel racket
The padel racket has a light weight varying between 310 and 340 grams, thus offering the agility and maneuverability necessary to move quickly on the court and refine your technique. This feature also allows players to extend their gaming sessions without feeling excessive fatigue.
The soft EVA Soft rubber core ensures precise ball exit control. This medium density foam not only provides optimal comfort when typing, but also allows maximum adaptability to different playing styles and player needs.
The incorporation of fiberglass into the frame and faces of the padel racket guarantees exceptional strength and durability, thus extending its lifespan. In addition, fiberglass reduces associated vibrations and discomfort, which contributes to the player's well-being by reducing the risk of joint injuries.
Design of the padel racket
As for the design, the combination of black and red planes with a glossy finish, as well as the white frame and linear details on the sides, offers a distinctive aesthetic. This combination adds a touch of style and visual appeal to the racket.
Who is the ideal player for this racket?
This Siux 2024 padel racket is perfectly suited to the needs of junior players, giving them the confidence and tools to enjoy a versatile game.
expert_notes: The Siux Diablo Revolution JR 3 is perfectly suited to junior players, thanks to its hybrid mold and low balance which promote better control.

name: Padel racket SIUX Electra ST3 Junior 2024
og_description: Discover the Siux Electra ST3 Junior padel racket, a round-shaped racket suitable for players aged 8 to 12.
description:
Your Electra ST3 Junior padel racket
This teardrop-shaped, medium-balanced racket offers good maneuverability and balanced weight distribution, resulting in powerful, precise shots.
Its fiberglass frame makes the racket both lightweight and durable. Fiberglass not only confers greater forgiveness than carbon, but also enriches the hitting experience thanks to improved feel on contact with the ball.
The foam used in the racket is low-density, offering superior playing comfort.
Carbon reinforcement in the handle secures the most fragile part of the racket, enabling players to hit balls close to the glass without damaging the racket.
EVA Ultra Soft High Recovery: This very low-density foam, ideal for players seeking comfort, has elastic properties that maintain the power of shots.
Glass Fiber: The construction of the glass fiber frame gives the racket greater lightness and flexibility, increasing forgiveness and reinforcing the structure of the racket.
expert_notes: Discover the Siux Electra ST3 Junior padel racket, a round-shaped racket suitable for players aged 8 to 12.

name: Padel racket Wilson Bela LT V2.5 2024
meta_description: The Wilson Brand In Collaboration With Star Fernando Belasteguin Has Developed The Edition Of The Wilson Bela LT
og_description: Discover the new edition of the Wilson Bela LT. This high-end, diamond-shaped padel racket has a medium balance. With a weight of 355g, the Wilson Bela LT is ultra versatile! A very balanced compromise between power and handling.
description:
Your Wilson Bela LT V2.5 2024 Padel racket
The lightest racket in the range, the Wilson Bela LT is comfortable on the arm.
The core of the Wilson Bela LT is made of Eva Foam, a soft foam that provides excellent comfort and ball speed at the racquet's exit.
Wilson uses carbon fiber face coating on both sides: layers of carbon that ensure maximum responsiveness and power at impact.
The plus point of this racket is the "Arrow-Grip" system, an arrowhead pattern on the surface of the racket, which adds feel and spin to the Wilson Bela Pro padel racket.
 The handle of the racket designed by the famous Fernando Belasteguin features an "anti-shock shield". The mix of PU and iso-zorb provides greater grip and comfort, while reducing the sensation of vibration.
Wrist Strap: The strap on this pala wraps around and tightens at the wrist to prevent loss of control. Bela personalized this strap with the words "A Belasteguin never gives up" in his daughter's Spanish script. 
What's the ideal player for this racket?
This new-generation pala has been created for players who never give up, and who do their utmost to achieve their goals. It's designed for advanced to expert players. The Bela LT V2.5 2024 combines power, maneuverability and comfort with control to maximize your chances of winning.
The design of this Padel racket 
The Wilson Bela LT V2.5 2 is white with red details. This color combination gives the racket an elegant, high-end look. The red enhances the racket's powerful feel.
expert_notes: Discover the new edition of the Wilson Bela LT. This high-end, diamond-shaped padel racket has a medium balance. With a weight of 355g, the Wilson Bela LT is ultra versatile! A very balanced compromise between power and handling.

name: Padel racket OXDOG Hyper Pro 2.0 2024
meta_description: Discover The Oxdog Hyper Pro 2.0 2024 Racket. It Is A Versatile Power-focused Racket, With Balance At The Top Of The Racket.
og_description: Discover the Oxdog Hyper Pro 2.0 2024 racket. It is a versatile power-oriented racket, with racket head balance and medium density rubber.
description:
Your Hyper Pro 2.0 2024 Padel racket
The Eva Medium medium-density rubber core offers more control and raw power, especially on smashes. Its Anti-Vibration System protects the arm and joints. Hyper 2.0 racquets are designed to minimize air resistance thanks to side-port technology, guaranteeing optimum performance. 
The high-density HES carbon frame and cover blend robustness and flexibility with excellent feel. The special carbon and resin formula used by Oxdog enhances fiber capabilities.
On the inside, the Eva Medium gum core features a balanced density that confers intermediate flexibility, increasing the precision and strength of shots, especially when smashing.
The RBS Balance system incorporates screw-adjustable stainless steel weights to adjust the racket's balance: 4 grams added upwards to promote head balance and 8 grams downwards for a centered weight.
Power Ribs reinforcements, combined with HES-Carbon, ensure rapid power transmission for enhanced performance, while guaranteeing great durability.
DSH (Double Size Holes) is a system of holes of varying sizes that improves grip on the ball, increases power and racket balance, optimizing play, even on off-center hits.
As for the Vibradamp, this is an innovative triple-layer anti-vibration system: a Vibradamp fiber at the heart of the handle absorbs shocks, reinforced by four detachable silicone inserts for enhanced vibration control, and a two-layer construction with a PU top coating for improved grip, a raised texture for optimum grip and perforations to absorb moisture. The device is designed to minimize strain on the wrist, elbow and shoulder.
Hyper Pro 2.0 2024 design
The racket has a streamlined design thanks to its shades of black and gray. It's an elegant, sober racket.
Who's the right player for this padel racket?
This racket is ideal for intermediate to advanced players looking for maneuverability and power.
expert_notes: Discover the Oxdog Hyper Pro 2.0 2024 racket. It is a versatile power-oriented racket, with racket head balance and medium density rubber.

name: Padel racket SIUX TRILOGY Lite Air 4 Women 2024
meta_description: Siux Presents The Women's Version Of The Trilogy 4 Lite Air 2024, A Racket That Stands Out As Much For Its Design As For Its Precision.
og_description: Siux presents the women's version of the Trilogy 4 Lite Air 2024, a racket that stands out as much for its design as for its precision.
description:
Your Siux Trilogy Lite Air 4 Women 2024 Padel racket
This racket is designed for advanced players. With its round shape and balanced handle, you'll be able to hit controlled shots with precision.
The Trilogy 4 Lite Air women features a high-density 3k carbon frame that makes the racket both light and strong. This material stiffens the pala, enabling you to send the ball across the court with an excellent return of force.
Technical description of the Trilogy Lite Air 4 Women 2024 racket
To compensate for the hardness of carbon, the racket features a low-density EVA foam inside. This foam effectively absorbs impact and guarantees excellent hitting sensations.
The surface of the racket is embossed for improved ball grip and spin, ideal for spin enthusiasts.
EVA ULTRA SOFT HIGH RECOVERY: The racket incorporates low-density foam, perfect for those looking to play more comfortably without sacrificing power. This technology ensures excellent recovery after each stroke, enabling you to maintain a constant playing power.
FULL 3K CARBON: Its frame is made entirely of 3K carbon, a high-density material that gives the racket powerful strokes while maintaining precise control. However, this comes at the price of reduced comfort.
SHOCK OUT: Thanks to a partnership with Shock Out, the racket is equipped with anti-vibrators that improve the feel of the game by absorbing impact, making every strike more comfortable.
ULTIMATE TECH: The racket's core is designed to reduce vibration and increase energy restitution, offering greater control and power.
BITUBE CARBON FRAME: The racket's edge is reinforced with carbon, increasing its durability. This feature is ideal for ensuring the racket's longevity, making it a reliable choice for demanding players.
Trilogy Lite Air 4 2024 racket design
The design of the Siux Trilogy Lite Air 4 women 2024 racket is both modern and attractive. With its green and orange color combination, it immediately attracts attention on the court. The Siux logo is perfectly integrated into the design. The edge of the racket is also finely crafted with raised geometric patterns, adding an extra touch to the racket's overall aesthetic.
Who's the perfect player?
The Siux Trilogy Lite Air 4 women 2024 is the ideal choice for advanced players looking for a racket that is precise and offers excellent playing comfort. Its modern design and attractive visual details make it a racket that won't go unnoticed on the court.
Key features:
Level: Advanced
Weight: 360-375g
Width: 38mm
Frame: Carbon 3K
Foam: EVA Soft
Shape: Round
expert_notes: Siux presents the women's version of the Trilogy 4 Lite Air 2024, a racket that stands out as much for its design as for its precision.

description:
Your PEGASUS revolution 2 2024 padel racket
Designed for expert players, the Pegasus frame is made from 12K carbon fiber, offering both strength and rigidity for optimal force feedback.
The addition of high-density rubber to the racket increases the speed of strokes while providing optimal force feedback.
What's more, it features integrated anti-vibration mounts to reduce vibration and minimize the risk of elbow injury.
The Siux Pegasus Revolution 2 offers a perfect balance of power, comfort and performance, making it ideal for demanding players looking for a versatile, efficient racket.
HARD EVA The racket's rubber is high-density Eva. Dense foam gives the racket increased control and power, sometimes at the expense of playing comfort. Recommended for advanced players.
FULL 12K CARBON: The racket frame is made of 100% 12K carbon. This rigid carbon allows the racket to deliver powerful hits without losing control.
SHOCK OUT: In partnership with Shock Out, the racket features anti-vibrators that absorb impact for a better feel.
ULTIMATE TECH: The heart of the racket has a structure that limits vibrations while promoting force feedback.
BITUBE CARBON FRAME: The edge of the racket is reinforced with carbon on the inside. Very useful for durability.
Who's the ideal player for this racket?
The Siux Pegasus Revolution 2 2024 is designed for advanced to expert players who want to perfect their technique and control. Perfect for those who value quality and are looking for a racket with modular features to suit a variety of playing styles.
The design of the EGASUS revolution 2 2024 racket
In terms of design, the racket is rather elegant, with a discreet look. The dominant color is black with a checkerboard effect. There are also hints of purple and chrome. The siux logo is embossed on the racket's frame, a welcome change from other rackets. The racket has a hybrid shape, somewhere between a diamond and a water droplet.
expert_notes: Discover the Siux Pegasus Revolution 2 padel racket, 2024 edition, designed to maximize power and precision using cutting-edge technologies.

name: Padel racket Head Radical Pro 2024
meta_description: The Head Radical Pro 2024 is the heaviest in the Radical range. With a teardrop shape, it has a medium balance.
og_description: At 370g, the Head Radical Pro 2024 is the heaviest racket in the Radical range. It has a teardrop shape and medium balance. This racquet is ideal if you're looking for control and power.
description: Libérez votre potentiel avec la Head Radical Pro 2024 Elle allie puissance et contrôle, ce qui rend ses coups plus efficaces. Chaque coup joué avec cette raquette de padel d’exception vous permettra de ressentir la puissance caractéristique de la Head Radical Pro.Les technologies de la raquette Head Radical Pro Hybrid WovenLe cadre et les faces de la Head Radical Pro sont composées de couches Hybrid Woven. Ce mélange de fibre de carbone et de fibre de verre va combiner le meilleur de ces deux fibres pour obtenir une résistance maximale. Au-delà de favoriser la puissance elle permet d’améliorer la précision et le toucher de vos frappes. Control FoamLe noyau de la raquette de padel Head Radical Pro est composé de la mousse Control Foam. AuxeticLa nouveauté de la Radical Pro vient de sa structure « Auxetic ». Cette nouvelle technologie stratégiquement positionnée au niveau du cadre de la raquette. Il donne au carbone des caractéristiques qui permet à ses fibres de se dilater et de se contracter lors des impacts. Cela procure un retour d’énergie incroyable de la balle et en plus une sensation agréable. Le cadreLe cadre de la Head Radical Pro a été réalisé sur-mesure et chaque section de tube a été construite individuellement. Cette technique de construction permet d’obtenir une raquette plus durable et plus performante. Smart BridgeElle est également dotée du système « Smart Bridge », ce qui améliore le contrôle et la précision des joueurs sur le court de padel.La Radical Pro est-elle faite pour vous ?Pour les joueurs qui ont besoin d’un apport supplémentaire au filet, la Radical Pro est faite pour vous ! Elle est conçue pour les joueurs de niveau avancé voire expérimenté qui souhaitent contrôler leurs coups puissants.Alliance de style et de performance Vous allez tomber sous le charme du design de cette nouvelle raquette. Le noir domine la surface de la raquette, tandis que des nuances de rouge, viennent apporter du caractère. Head : La marque des sports de raquettes Dans le monde du Padel la marque Head n’est plus à présenter. En effet depuis de nombreuse années la marque a investi le padel et ce fut un succès. Head a réussi petit à petit à conquérir un public de joueurs passionnés dont le célèbre Sanyo Guttierez. Grâce à des raquettes de padel, du textile, des sacs et des accessoires de grande qualité, Head est maintenant l’une des marques de Padel les plus prestigieuse.
expert_notes: At 370g, the Head Radical Pro 2024 is the heaviest racket in the Radical range. It has a teardrop shape and medium balance. This racquet is ideal if you're looking for control and power.

name: Padel racket Varlion LW SUMMUM CARBON BLACK
meta_description: Discover the LW Summum Carbon Black by Varlion. Designed for professional players, it offers exceptional control with advanced technologies, fiberglass material, and an elegant design. Includes self-adhesive protector and Begins cover.
og_description: The LW Summum Carbon Black is a versatile and high-performing racket, ideal for intermediate to advanced players. It combines high-quality materials, innovative technologies, and a refined design for a superior playing experience.
description: Varlion LW Summum Carbon BlackThe Varlion LW Summum Carbon Black is a high-performance padel racket, specially designed for demanding players seeking the perfect balance between power, control, and comfort. With its sleek and modern design, it stands out with a carbon black finish, giving it a sophisticated and professional look.Technologies of the Varlion LW Summum Carbon BlackAerodynamic Drilling Studies have shown that drilling the center of the racket can cause turbulence. To address this, the racket features innovative aerodynamic drilling technology. This system enhances the core's resistance and the consistency of shots, while expanding the contact zone for improved performance.Soft Color Softcolor is an aesthetic innovation that allows the rubber to be dyed according to the racket's design. This technology adds an elegant and unique touch of color to the racket’s appearance.Summum This model features an extended handle, a 1 cm larger striking surface, and a Wings Diffuser. These elements improve maneuverability, control, and comfort, especially beneficial for players using a two-handed backhand.HandleSafety The HandleSafety system is integrated into the racket's handle, with a cord running through both sides of the handle to prevent separation between the racket and the cord. This system also provides increased wrist comfort.Slice Texture Curved lines are arranged in two directions on the racket’s surface, allowing players, whether left-handed or right-handed, to apply better effects during slices. This texture enhances the racket’s ability to generate spins.Hexagon Frame & Protector The hexagonal frame reinforces one of the racket’s most vulnerable areas, providing increased durability and preventing breakage to extend the equipment’s lifespan.Which Player Is This Racket For?The Varlion LW Summum Carbon Black is ideal for intermediate to advanced padel players looking for a perfect balance of power, control, and comfort. name: Padel racket Varlion Maxima Summum Prisma Soft
meta_description: Discover the Maxima Summum Prisma Soft: advanced racket with elegant design and high-performance capabilities, perfect for precise control and maximum power on the court.
og_description: The Varlion Maxima Summum Prisma Soft racket stands out for its high-end features and understated design with a touch of cyan, a distinctive note highlighting the brand.
description: Explore your potential with the Maxima Summum Prisma Soft.The Maxima Summum Prisma Soft is an advanced racket characterized by a medium balance and renowned for its elegant design, aerodynamics, and exceptional performance on the court. Made from a bidirectional carbon frame, this racket features a 38mm low-density EVA SOFTCOLOR CORE, laminated between layers of carbon and fiberglass, reinforced with carbon fiber. All materials are infused with Varlion's exclusive VAR-FLEX epoxy resin and coated with a layer of titanium dioxide. The Maxima Summum Prisma Soft adopts the MAXIMA shape, an exclusive blend of traditional round (for control) and tear-drop (for balance) shapes. This unique Varlion design enhances power in defensive shots, offering a 60% control and 40% power ratio.The technologies of the Maxima Summum Prisma Soft.Aerodynamic Drilling According to studies conducted using fluid dynamics software, it has been proven that the central drilling of the racket generates turbulence. That's why the Bourne Summum Carbon Black is equipped with a new drilling system called Aerodynamic Drilling. This technology reinforces the core and achieves greater strike uniformity, thereby increasing the racket's sweet spot area.Summum Technology Summum technology brings three significant improvements to racket performance: A longer handle: Unlike standard rackets with a 12.5 cm handle, Summum rackets have a 14.5 cm grip, providing a more comfortable and professional grip, particularly advantageous for players using a two-handed backhand. Increased hitting surface by 1 cm: This extension offers the largest hitting surface among professional rackets, allowing for better control and increased responsiveness during play. Difusor Wings: This aerodynamically improved diffuser provides superior maneuverability and precision.Prisma Frame and Protector The Prisma frame is designed to minimize damage caused to the racket when hitting against walls or glass. Thanks to its prismatic shape, this frame reduces contact surface by up to 90% and improves air resistance by 10%, thus offering better maneuverability and increased acceleration during impacts.Slice rough texture SLICE is the most effective rough texture on the market, composed of curved lines on the racket face in both directions. This allows left-handed and right-handed players to increase slice rotation. For Premium Range rackets, this texture is directly integrated into the mold, rather than added by screen printing or decal.Handlesafety Handlesafety is a safety system integrated into the racket handle. Unlike traditional grips with a centered hole, this system passes the string through both walls of the handle, preventing any separation. It also offers increased wrist comfort.EVA SOFTCOLOR CORE The core consists of EVA SOFTCOLOR CORE rubber with medium hardness of 38 mm, laminated with layers of carbon fabric and fiberglass, reinforced by carbon fiber.Sobriety and originalityThe Varlion Maxima Summum Prisma Soft paddle combines sobriety and originality in its design. Its dominant black color reflects the sobriety and elegance characteristic of high-end Varlion paddles. The touch of cyan in the center adds a note of originality that highlights the paddle's brand.Who is the ideal player for the Varlion Maxima Summum Prisma Soft ?The Varlion Maxima Summum Prisma Soft paddle has been developed for advanced Padel players seeking power in their game. It will appeal to expert players looking for sensations. Are you looking for a soft yet rigid paddle to hit powerful shots consistently? Then look no further. Enjoy the combination of maneuverability and power to maximize your performance on the court with this high-end paddle.
expert_notes: The Varlion Maxima Summum Prisma Soft racket stands out for its high-end features and understated design with a touch of cyan, a distinctive note highlighting the brand.

name: Padel racket Head Speed Team 2025
meta_description: The Head Speed ​​Team Racket Embodies Elegance And Power In Its Sober Design And Its Formidable Efficiency On The Court.
og_description: The Head Speed Team padel racket has a teardrop shape, with a "low" racket balance, allowing for great versatility between power and maneuverability.
description: The head Speed Team racket is made up of the indispensable "Power Foam" in its core. This historical "soft" foam from the Austrian brand Head guarantees a very comfortable feel while providing you with great speed in your ball strikes. The result is worth the diversions!Unlike the Seed Pro and the Speed Motion, the Head Speed Team is made of fibreglass on both sides of the racket. The fiberglass provides a more comfortable feel at impact, while gaining more ball speed at the exit of the racket.New for 2025! The frame of this new Speed Team uses "Graphene Inside". Graphene Inside technology is the new adaptation of graphene material. It is methodically placed in the frame and on the surfaces of the racket to optimise the performance of the material. Derived from carbon, graphene provides maximum stability and optimises the transfer of energy from the blade to the ball. Additional technologiesAuxetic: New for 2025 Use of Auxetic materials that expand when stretched to improve the responsiveness of the racquet at ball impactSoft Buttcap: New in 2025 , this soft cap technology is a shock absorbing rubber addition to the racket handle.Smart Bridge technology has been developed to allow the racquet to adapt to the user's playing style. The Skin Padel anti-shock system, a technology unique to Head, creates extra protection against shocks, to minimise the consequences of shocks over time and limit scratches. The ideal sweetspot is optimised with the Optimized Sweet Spot technology for a good fit of the racket to the player.What is the ideal player for the Head Speed Team?The Head Speed Team is designed for intermediate to advanced players looking for a combination of control and comfort. The Head Speed Elite is a very comfortable racket for both attacking and defending players. It is a great racket to have fun with.If you're looking for a more demanding and powerful feel to your game, the Head Speed Pro is for you!
expert_notes: The Head Speed Team padel racket has a teardrop shape, with a "low" racket balance, allowing for great versatility between power and maneuverability.

description: High-Speed Performance with the Head Speed One X 2025The Head Speed One X padel racket features a teardrop shape, a weight of 365g, and a head-heavy balance. name: Padel racket Bullpadel Hack 04 2025
meta_description: With The New Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 Diamond Shape, You Will Find Power, Precision And Aggressiveness. For Padel Players With An Aggressive Style.
og_description: In diamond shape, you'll find power, precision, and aggressiveness in the Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 To be wielded by skilled players with an aggressive style.
description: Your Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 Padel RacquetThe Hack 04 2025 is a top-of-the-range padel racket made from top-quality materials. It also boasts great durability thanks to several reinforced zones around the frame. Weighing in at between 365-375 grams, the Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 is quite demanding and is best suited to aggressive players of a good level looking to add power to finish points.Technical description of the Hack 04 2025 racketSurface finish of the Hack 04 2025The surface of Paquito Navarro's padel racket has a "TriCarbon" fibre coating. This technology involves assembling several finer, lighter carbon fibres in a three-dimensional manner. This interweaving gives the racket a more responsive feel for better performance on the court. In simple terms, this process makes the Hack 04 more resistant, with very good control on impact and maximum power on finishing smashes.The 3D G technology used in the Hack 04  racquet makes it possible to accentuate the spin in all your shots!Bullpadel uses 100% carbon CarbonTube technology for the frame. This bi-directional interlocking process guarantees optimum mechanical response. In short, CarbonTube gives the Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 great solidity and a perfect balance between power and control. Foam of the Hack 04 2025 padel racketBullpadel uses MultiEva foam for the foam in the Bullpadel Hack 04 2025. This two-layer EVA foam technology with different densities provides good rigidity and a longer lifespan to the racket for a very good feeling of control on impact with the ball. The Multi Eva foam also retains the quality of power needed for offensive phases such as smashes and powerful volleys.Additional technologiesBullpadel's Hack and Vertex ranges use the new "Metals-hield" frame. This Bullpadel innovation adapts perfectly to the new "CustomWeight" weight distribution system, which makes it possible to modify the balance of the racket according to the needs of each player.A CW aluminium protector also protects the racquet frame. This innovative, flexible and lightweight system is integrated into the frame of all Bullpadel racquets in the Pro Line collection, such as the Hack and Vertex.To offer a more manoeuvrable racquet and compensate for the weight of the racquet head, Bullpadel has developed the "Air React Channel" system. The air flows through an open channel in the heart of the racket, increasing its aerodynamics and providing optimum manoeuvrability.As far as the solidity of the racquet is concerned, Bullpadel's new version features a new 'Hack' system at the heart of the racquet, as well as 'Nerve' channels on the sides of the frame to reinforce the racquet and make it more resistant, but also to give it as much power as possible, especially when smashing.Equipped with a Vibradrive anti-vibration system, which greatly reduces racket vibrations, the Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 guarantees maximum playing comfort while avoiding possible injuries caused by too much vibration.The latest (and probably best-known) technology to be found on the handle of the Hack 04 2025 is the famous Hesacore Grip. This 'honeycomb'-shaped grip provides better support for the handle. It reduces vibration, stress and the risk of injury.Who's the ideal player for this racket?The Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 is aimed at advanced to professional padel players looking for great power in their game. A professional quality paddle, the Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 will not disappoint in terms of the balance between power and control. Explosive on attacking shots, it will make you a player feared by all. The Hack 04 2025 is still easy to handle thanks to Bullpadel's technology. Once tamed, this quality racket will make you a danger to all your opponents.
expert_notes: In diamond shape, you'll find power, precision, and aggressiveness in the Bullpadel Hack 04 2025 To be wielded by skilled players with an aggressive style.

name: Padel racket Bullpadel Neuron 02 26
meta_description: Discover the Bullpadel Neuron 02 2026, Federico Chingotto’s official racket. Precision, comfort and stability with PrismLock, MultiEva core and Xtend Carbon 3K frame.
og_description: Created in collaboration with Fede Chingotto, the fantastic Argentine right-handed player, the Bullpadel Neuron 02 2026 is going to make waves!
description: Bullpadel Neuron 02 2026 – The Official Racket of Federico ChingottoPrecision, comfort and stabilityThe Bullpadel Neuron 02 2026 is the racket chosen by Federico Chingotto. Designed for players seeking the perfect balance between control and comfort, it offers superior maneuverability and total stability thanks to its low balance and firm structure.
